type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Fluctuations year to year depending on the volume of wastewater being processed. Also, In 2024, the concentration of Nitrate-Nitrogen was used to convert to Nitrate ion, as this is a more accurate way of estimating its emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Fluctuations year to year depending on the volume of wastewater being processed. In 2024, air emission was estimated based on the mass balance between the emissions of influent, effluent, and sludge, to be more accurate

Fluctuations year to year depending on the volume of wastewater being processed. Also, In 2024, the phosphorus disposal was estimated based on the concentration of phosphorus in the sludge using source monitoring method, as it is more accurate.

reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Autres (précisez dans le champ des commentaires)

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: Previously, the Aquatera WWTP underwent upgrades to improve processes and to minimize nutrient loading. Additionally, Aquatera implements capital upgrades/processes as required to be compliant with its EPEA Operating Approval and to ensure its compliant with Environment Canada's WSER, etc.
